Part 2. Air Quality Index (AQI) Classification


    healthy not_healthy 
       5687        3304

Q4. Model

             actual predicted
actual    1.0000000 0.9939983
predicted 0.9939983 1.0000000
[1] 251.573
             actual predicted
actual    1.0000000 0.8161181
predicted 0.8161181 1.0000000
[1] 948684.6

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ co_ug_m3 + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ug_m3, family = binomial, data = data_remove_outlier, 
    na.action = na.omit)

Coefficients:
              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
(Intercept) -2.822e+02  4.855e+01  -5.813 6.13e-09 ***
co_ug_m3    -3.932e-03  1.072e-03  -3.667 0.000245 ***
benzene_ppb  2.259e+00  5.237e-01   4.313 1.61e-05 ***
nox_ppb      1.404e+00  2.423e-01   5.796 6.79e-09 ***
no2_ug_m3    1.657e-02  1.428e-02   1.160 0.245971    
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

(Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)

    Null deviance: 11824.965  on 8990  degrees of freedom
Residual deviance:    58.891  on 8986  degrees of freedom
AIC: 68.891

Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 17

[1] "the AIC value of this GLM is  68.8907000528746"

Call:
lm(formula = aqi ~ co_ppm + no2_ppb + i_co + i_no2 + i_benzene + 
    i_nox, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

lm(formula = aqi ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + nox_ppb + no2_ppb + 
    temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

[1] "the AIC value of this LM (AQI prediction based on pollutant and temperature + humidities) is  65892.9789215164"
[1] "the GVIF^(1/(2*Df)) value of this LM (AQI prediction based on pollutant and temperature + humidities) is 1"

Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 9.428 on 8962 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.9545,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.9543 
F-statistic:  6709 on 28 and 8962 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16


Call:
glm(formula = as.factor(clean_data$aqi_health) ~ (co_ppm + benzene_ppb + 
    nox_ppb + no2_ppb + temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity)^2, 
    family = binomial, data = clean_data, na.action = na.omit)

Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

(Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)

    Null deviance: 11825.0  on 8990  degrees of freedom
Residual deviance:  4036.9  on 8962  degrees of freedom
AIC: 4094.9

Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 25

Q5. Sample Hypothesis’

H_0 (null): Pollutant concentrations have no effect on the calculated AQI

H_a (alternative): At least one pollutant concentration significantly predicts the AQI

[1] 861.1113

Call:
lm(formula = log(aqi) ~ co_ppm + nox_ppb + no2_ppb + sensor_o3, 
    data = train_data)

Residuals:
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-1.83040 -0.08868  0.06099  0.15830  0.64765 

Coefficients:
             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept) 3.780e+00  1.092e-02 346.329   <2e-16 ***
co_ppm      2.965e-03  4.909e-03   0.604    0.546    
nox_ppb     4.791e-04  3.052e-05  15.695   <2e-16 ***
no2_ppb     8.440e-03  2.071e-04  40.747   <2e-16 ***
sensor_o3   3.202e-04  1.348e-05  23.744   <2e-16 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 0.2568 on 7187 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.6788,    Adjusted R-squared:  0.6786 
F-statistic:  3797 on 4 and 7187 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

H_0: Environmental factors have no relationship with log(AQI)

H_a: Environmetal factors significantly influence log(AQI)

[1] 9144.874

Call:
lm(formula = log(aqi) ~ temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity, 
    data = train_data)

Residuals:
     Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
-2.52894 -0.08145  0.08268  0.23068  1.12367

                    Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)

relative_humidty   5.046e-04  8.365e-05   6.032 1.70e-09 ***
absolute_humidity -2.714e-01  3.895e-02  -6.969 3.48e-12 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1

Residual standard error: 0.4568 on 7188 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.04959,   Adjusted R-squared:  0.04919 
F-statistic:   125 on 3 and 7188 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16

H_0: Combining environmental variables and pollutant concentrations does not improve the models predictions

H_a: The combined model provides statistically more fit AQI predicting

[1] 362.1584

Call:
lm(formula = log(aqi) ~ co_ppm + benzene_ug_m3 + nox_ppb + no2_ppb + 
    temperature_c + relative_humidty + absolute_humidity, data = train_data)
